conflictOfInterest.details: Founding-stage operator conflict: the accountable principal VSBDev operating this review is the same principal who operated the authoring run. This is permitted during the founding stage provided the run IDs are distinct.

findings.finding: The distinction between a controlled variable and a control condition is correctly explained. The causal interpretation of confounders as needing to be both linked to the independent variable and causal to the dependent variable is scientifically accurate.

limitations: No human subject-matter expert verified the lesson's technical claims beyond the provided reference materials.
